headline: Nutrition Fundamentals
description: Nutrition provides the energy and nutrients necessary for health. Macronutrients: carbohydrates (4 cal/g, energy), proteins (4 cal/g, repair/build), fats (9 cal/g, hormone production, cell membranes). Micronutrients: vitamins and minerals needed in small amounts. Water: essential for all bodily functions. Balance, variety, moderation are key principles.
